prerequisites: An active Shutterstock account with a registered API application, created at https://www.shutterstock.com/account/developers/apps (this provides a consumer key and consumer secret).
An API subscription (free or paid) obtained at https://www.shutterstock.com/api/pricing. These API subscriptions are separate from Shutterstock website subscriptions.
A generated API access token to supply as the api_token field.
Search query strings to drive each stream: query_for_audio_search, query_for_catalog_search, query_for_image_search, and query_for_video_search.
A start_date to bound the records returned.

authMethods.name: API token (Bearer access token)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the single secret field api_token. Generate an access token from your Shutterstock application's details page (Generate token), or via the OAuth flow at /v2/oauth/authorize and /v2/oauth/access_token. The token is sent on every request as an HTTP Authorization Bearer header (for example, Authorization: Bearer v2/...). Tokens beginning with v2/ do not expire.

setupSteps.title: Create a Shutterstock API application
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Shutterstock and create an application at https://www.shutterstock.com/account/developers/apps. This issues a consumer key and consumer secret that identify your application.

setupSteps.title: Get an API subscription
setupSteps.body: Obtain a free or paid API subscription at https://www.shutterstock.com/api/pricing. Per the Shutterstock docs, these API subscriptions are separate from the subscriptions on the Shutterstock website and are required to access the API.

setupSteps.title: Generate an access token
setupSteps.body: From your application's details page, click Generate token to create an access token, or run the OAuth flow using /v2/oauth/authorize followed by /v2/oauth/access_token. Tokens prefixed with v2/ do not expire.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated token in the api_token field. The connector sends it as an Authorization: Bearer header on each API request.

setupSteps.title: Configure the search and date fields
setupSteps.body: Set query_for_image_search, query_for_video_search, query_for_audio_search, and query_for_catalog_search to the search terms you want to pull results for, and set start_date to bound the records returned. All of these fields are required.
